values.user_data:
#!/bin/bash
sleep 60
curl -sfL https://get.k3s.io | 
K3S_URL=https://172.16.21.10:6443 \
K3S_TOKEN=K3s-Secret-2026-Token sh -s server

#!/bin/bash
sleep 60
# Set hostname based on mapping: worker-<n>-<role>
hostnamectl set-hostname worker-dev-$(( 0 + 1 ))-Client-BFF
curl -sfL https://get.k3s.io | 
K3S_URL=https://172.16.21.10:6443 \
K3S_TOKEN=K3s-Secret-2026-Token sh -s - agent --kubelet-arg=max-pods=3

#!/bin/bash
sleep 60
# Set hostname based on mapping: worker-<n>-<role>
hostnamectl set-hostname worker-dev-$(( 1 + 1 ))-Provider-BFF
curl -sfL https://get.k3s.io | 
K3S_URL=https://172.16.21.10:6443 \
K3S_TOKEN=K3s-Secret-2026-Token sh -s - agent --kubelet-arg=max-pods=3
